activation.note: Live read completed 2026-07-12 08:46-09:00 IDT against PostHog UTC projects 171597 and 270848. RunSmart excludes emulator, TestFlight, sideloaded and known founder prefixes; Resumely excludes is_internal_tester plus the four established founder/QA/bot person prefixes. No monetization, paid ads, or product-change claim is unlocked by these 0% results. Re-read Resumely's post-live 1.4.1 picker cohort on 2026-07-18 minimum / 2026-07-25 preferred; re-read WP-42 after one clean disclosure viewer, with 10 required for a product recommendation.
